pr.title:
Non-record: Knowledge Distillation — A Negative
  Result (val_bpb=1.1553)

output.summary: Cached teacher logits for soft KL distillation but overhead (~11ms/step) offset benefits, so a bigger teacher can’t beat the baseline in ten-minute runs.
techniques: Cached top-32 teacher logits to amortize distillation cost
Soft KL distillation with varying alpha/temp to probe signal vs overhead
Extended runs confirm step penalty keeps curves aligned
